channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipped bed mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks & rubble left in the alleyway, 11th April
item.description:
We continually have rubbish dumped down the alleyway outside the back exit of our house. It makes it very difficult for us and our neighbours to be able to use the exit. In the past we've filled boot loads of the rubbish and taken to the tip in order to keep it tidy through there. This was dumped a couple of months ago and we feel this shouldn't be down to us to have to remove anymore.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-8, Crayford Way, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gloucester Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Suitcase in front of 2-40 Finchale Road., 11th April
item.description:
Suitcase is the car park side of 2-40 Finchale Road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Peterstone Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Boat park on street, 11th April
item.description:
Boat is blocking alot of construction lorries from passing through and coaches for West Reservoir Centre. We have contacted the owner to move the boat and they have failed to do so.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Allerton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accident debris and glass on pavement, 11th April
item.description:
Car accident on Tuesday outside my property. Police attended. Glass and debris from the cars left on the pavement and the car is parked dangerously on the kerb. Schools return on Monday. Children and families will need to walk and glass is particularly dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 151, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flipping from 120 Palace Road up the road, 11th April
item.description:
Fly tipping is consistent outside these properties

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 139, Palace Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed bin collection, 11th April
item.description:
Missed bin collection again, bin overflowing since the second bin was removed.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilton Way, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of rubbish by Creasy Estate, 11th April
item.description:
Lots of flytipping by the Creasy estate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Aberdour Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In need of attention, 11th April
item.description:
Marked up and in need of attention

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Ludgate Hill, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees have damaged and pushed fence panel down which are the councils responsibility., 11th April
item.description:
Trees are on walk path next to 1 lakeside close DA15 9pw. Fence panels are located there also and have been damaged

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lakeside Close, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin bag dumped outside 213 Okehampton Crescent, 11th April
item.description:
Bin bag dumped adjacent to bus stop outside 213 Okehampton Crescent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Okehampton Crescent, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish around bin, 11th April
item.description:
Rubbish around bin
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cambridge Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th April
item.description:
Rubbish tipped into river Quaggy in Mottingham road on the side of Greenwich council. This location is at the end if Winn Road that is Greenwich. Please come and clear it before it rains as it will over flow due to blockage. Also the green to the left of it has a lot of the flying tipped rubbish too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking pavement slabs, 11th April
item.description:
Due to the constant flow of water over the pavement the subsoil has been undermined and several pavement slabs are now rocking as they are walked over. This could lead to a fall and possible injury to a pedestrian. The water flow has been reported long time now with no action so pavement is deteriorating causing difficulties to pedestrians
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple bags of rubbish left out during the day, 11th April
item.description:
The sushi shop is leaving multiple bags of rubbish out all day. Today minimum of 8 bags dumped outside their shop against the tree making the street look very dirty
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 344, Caledonian Road, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox Silwood Street, 11th April
item.description:
I reported a dead fox yesterday on Silwood Street, turn out someone has covered it up with a towel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Silwood Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cones in the road, 11th April
item.description:
My neighbour keeps blocking the road with cones and traffic obstruction items he finds locally. He never uses the space he keeps clear and presumably it means that he is taking cones and signs from other areas they might be needed. If we move them he finds more.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kennington Park Road, Kennington, Greater London
